constraint_check.SEC-002: failing — "adminRouter" imports publicProcedure and is a tRPC router — use protectedProcedure for all mutations to prevent unauthorized access.
constraint_check.SEC-PRISMA-001: failing — Prisma mutation accessRequest.update is reachable without an auth check.

active.plain_language: adminRouter has no login requirement. Anyone who knows the address could access it.
active.detail: "adminRouter" imports publicProcedure and is a tRPC router — use protectedProcedure for all mutations to prevent unauthorized access.
active.remediation: Replace publicProcedure with protectedProcedure, or add explicit authorization logic.

active.plain_language: Changes to your data in adminRouter can be made without verifying who the user is.
active.detail: Prisma mutation accessRequest.update is reachable without an auth check.
active.remediation: Add getServerSession(), auth.check(), or similar before calling the mutation from the server action or API route.
